title: morilandia obcordata
side_effects: Morilandia obcordata can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, diarrhea, and vomiting due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extract can also lead to liver damage and an increased risk of bleeding disorders. Additionally, improper use of Morilandia obcordata may cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in sensitive individuals. In severe cases, the plant's toxic compounds can even cause kidney failure and death if left untreated.
